en: Singular artificial intelligences that may or may not manefest in physical form(s)
Cyborgs are mechanically transformed persons that retain only a small biological part,  possibly only a brain or parts of a brain
Embodied are uploaded persons generally (re-)manefesting in a physical body of some sort
Satellites including minor moons, but not major moons nor their satellites
Organic persons are primarily biological,  but may be modified in form or mechanically augmented
Asteroids,  comets and spacecraft in heliocentric orbit
Uploaded are electronic copies of living biological persons and the electronic offspring of such persons,  generally existing in virtual reality only
